response.justification: Bogdan brings highly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and high-throughput microservices (handling millions of requests/sec). He also possesses a strong ownership mindset as a founder and Staff engineer. However, his complete lack of demonstrated Python experience—a strict must-have for the role—makes him a borderline fit, despite his excellent distributed systems and TypeScript background.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators for agentic workflows.
Proven capability in high-throughput distributed systems, previously handling millions of requests per second.
Strong ownership mindset and technical leadership demonstrated through Staff-level roles and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: No mention of Python experience, which is listed as a strong must-have technical skill for the role.
Unconventional core tech stack history (heavy reliance on DLang and Node.js) compared to standard Python/TS enterprise stacks.
His most relevant AI-tooling role at re:cinq appears very recent, raising questions about the depth and duration of this specific experience.
